title: AEW confirms Andrade El Idolo match for next week’s Dynamite
summary: AEW confirms Andrade El Idolo match for next week’s Dynamite
imageAlt: AEW confirms Andrade El Idolo match for next week’s Dynamite
aiSummary: AEW confirms Andrade El Idolo match for next week’s Dynamite
keyPoints: AEW confirms Andrade El Idolo match for next week’s Dynamite
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.
fullArticle:
AEW has officially confirmed a match for next week’s edition of Dynamite.

Andrade El Idolo vs. Jake Doyle of the Don Callis Family is now scheduled for the show.

The match was set up on last night’s edition of Dynamite, with Don Callis telling Andrade that if he could defeat Doyle, he would earn a shot at Mark Davis’ AEW National Championship.

AEW has since confirmed that Andrade vs. Doyle will take place on next week’s edition of Dynamite, which is scheduled for the MGM Music Hall at Fenway in Boston.

“Andrade wants revenge vs #DCF + their gold! He’ll have a shot to earn a National Title match if he can beat Jake Doyle, who wants payback for Andrade’s low blow in the Death’s Door match, WEDNESDAY!”

Andrade vs. Doyle is the first match to be confirmed for next week’s Dynamite.
